summary: Iteration 46: All UI fixes and database state verified. Toast position (offset 96px), notification badge amber (#C8861A), bee emoji in Daily Prompt (🐝), empty feed state after placeholder cleanup, mobile bottom nav with 5 icons, ISO card styling (rounded-xl, outlined OPEN badge), beta dropdown cream background all confirmed working.

critical_code_review_comments: Toaster offset='96px' properly positions toast below 88px nav bar
NotificationBell badge uses bg-[#C8861A] for amber color
All streak displays use literal 🐝 emoji instead of Flame icon
ISO card styling consistent with design specs (rounded-xl, outlined badge)
Beta dropdown bg-[#FAF6EE] matches page cream background

success_rate.backend: 100% (core endpoints working, some rate limiting during test)

seed_data_creation: None (50 daily prompts and 48 bingo squares were added by main agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 complete. All UI fixes verified: toast offset 96px below nav, notification badge amber #C8861A, bee emoji 🐝 in streaks, empty feed state, ISO card rounded-xl with outlined OPEN badge, beta dropdown cream bg. Posts collection now empty (148 placeholder posts deleted). Daily prompts (50) and bingo squares (76) available in DB. Backend rate limiter is in-memory - restart with 'sudo supervisorctl restart backend' if login fails with 429.
